description: Replace the Multi-Select Floating Action Bar (lines 6000-6065 in src/App.jsx) with a compact selection box that expands into an action menu on click. The new design: (1) Shows a small, rounded pill/box at 50% opacity displaying '{count} Selected' when nodes are selected. (2) The entire box is clickable, toggling an expanded action menu. (3) On hover, opacity increases to ~75%. (4) On click, the menu expands to 100% opacity showing all existing actions (Delete, Duplicate, Export, Link, Group) with icons and labels. (5) Menu closes when an action is taken, user clicks outside, or selection is cleared. (6) All existing action logic (delete, duplicate, export, link, group) is preserved exactly as-is. (7) The Escape key still clears selection (existing handler at line 1432). (8) A small X button is visible to clear selection without expanding the menu.
steps: Create a new branch 'feat/redesign-selection-toolbar' from main
In src/App.jsx, add a new state variable for the action menu open/closed state: const [selectionMenuOpen, setSelectionMenuOpen] = useState(false) near the other multi-selection states around line 452
Add a useEffect that closes the menu when selectedNodeIds changes to empty: when selectedNodeIds.length === 0, set selectionMenuOpen to false
Add a click-outside handler: a useEffect with a mousedown event listener that closes the menu when clicking outside the selection box container. Use a ref on the container element.

Replace the entire Multi-Select Floating Action Bar section (the {selectedNodeIds.length > 0 && (...)} block at lines 6000-6065) with the new compact design: a fixed-position container at bottom-center with z-[80] that renders (a) a compact rounded pill showing '{count} Selected' at 50% opacity by default, 75% on hover, 100% when menu is open, and (b) a popover/expanded menu above it containing the action buttons when selectionMenuOpen is true

The compact pill should be approximately min-w-[80px] with py-1.5 px-3 padding, rounded-full, cursor-pointer, with the entire surface clickable to toggle the menu. Include a small X button on the right side of the pill to clear selection without opening the menu.

The expanded menu should appear above the pill (using bottom positioning), with a compact vertical or grid layout showing all 5 actions (Delete, Duplicate, Export, Link, Group) each with their icon and label. Preserve the exact onClick handlers from the current implementation for each action. After any action fires, also call setSelectionMenuOpen(false).
Use Tailwind classes for opacity transitions: opacity-50 default, hover:opacity-75, and opacity-100 when menu is open. Add transition-opacity for smooth effect.
Run npm run build to verify no errors
acceptance_criteria: Running npm run build succeeds without errors
The old full-width toolbar with all buttons always visible is removed
A compact pill showing '{count} Selected' appears when selectedNodeIds.length > 0
The pill starts at 50% opacity and increases to ~75% on hover
Clicking anywhere on the pill opens an action menu at 100% opacity
The action menu contains Delete, Duplicate, Export, Link, and Group buttons with icons

All action handlers are preserved exactly (delete removes selected nodes/edges/images, duplicate creates copies offset by 40px, export calls exportSelectedNodes, link connects exactly 2 nodes, group creates a new group)
Clicking outside the menu closes it
Selecting an action closes the menu
Clearing selection (via X button or Escape key) closes the menu
The component is positioned fixed at bottom-center with z-[80]
verification: Run npm run build in /projects/sandbox/Clear-mind and confirm exit code 0
findings: Build succeeds. npm install was required first (node_modules not pre-installed). The dist/ directory is generated by build but not tracked. All acceptance criteria met - compact pill with expandable menu replaces the old full-width toolbar.
